week_plan.primary: CS224R L1: Intro to Deep RL, MDPs, imitation learning
CS224R L2: Policy gradients, REINFORCE, variance reduction
CS224R L3: Actor-critic, value functions, GAE
week_plan.secondary: MIT 6.S184 L1: ODEs, flows, generative modeling basics

week_plan.primary: CS224R L4: Q-learning, off-policy methods, DQN family
week_plan.secondary: MIT 6.S184 L2: Flow matching training objective

week_plan.primary: CS224R L5: Model-based RL, world models
week_plan.secondary: MIT 6.S184 L3: Conditional flow matching, guidance
MIT 6.S184 L4: Score matching and the diffusion connection

week_plan.primary: CS224R L8: RLHF and RL for LLMs/agents
CS224R L10: Frontiers, open problems, course synthesis

plan_note: Lecture titles are approximate; the daily agent verifies against the playlists and follows reality, noting deviations.

quest_map.oracle: Probability Oracle: the RL + Flow Matching course thread (math core)
quest_map.crafting: Agent Architect: from-scratch coding drill (Python, SQL, DS&A, agents)
quest_map.azure: Cloud Warden: AI-103 arc, one item per day
quest_map.lore: Discovery: world scan + vetted paper cards

ai103_arc.focus: Plan and manage an AI solution (25-30%)
items: Managed Identity, keyless auth, private networking, RBAC

ai103_arc.focus: The tail: CV, text, extraction (~30%, weakest first)
items: image and video generation, multimodal understanding
Content Understanding, prompt injection in images, watermarks
AI Search: ingest, index, semantic, hybrid, vector

ai103_arc.after: From week 5 on: practice-assessment loop on weakest domains. Voucher: redeem by 2026-08-18, sit by 2026-10-18, pass 700/1000.

weekly_rhythm.saturday: Raid: spaced-retrieval challenges across all four trees, no new material
weekly_rhythm.sunday: Repair: weekly synthesis + Feynman re-teach of the weakest concept + next-week bridge

topic_pools.note: The generator draws quiz/drill/judgment topics from these pools and rotates until covered; sourced from the Living Codex starter lists, MatchIQ CONCEPTS, and the curriculum tails.

projects: MatchIQ sports probability engine (Poisson, Dixon-Coles, calibration, Kelly)
Claude harness and orchestration, MCP and A2A systems
agenteval-bench: agent evaluation and regression tracking
mcp-guard and protobuf-fuzz-guard: adversarial fuzzing and security
